diagnosis.final_diagnosis: Acute Cellular Rejection of liver transplant
diagnosis.differential_diagnosis: Autoimmune hepatitis, immune-mediated drug reaction, acute viral hepatitis
diagnosis.diagnostic_reasoning: The liver biopsy showed features most consistent with moderate acute cellular rejection, evidenced by a triad of acute cellular rejection and significant clinical findings. While other conditions could histologically resemble this picture, the specific inflammatory infiltrate and bile duct damage pointed towards rejection as the most likely diagnosis.
